EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name}@{subject.domain} removed the policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name}@{subject.domain} created the policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name}@{subject.domain} changed the main attributes of the policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
